creator: val@packett.cool
text:
multimedia/clutter-gst3: I think it was fixed by the gnome update

net-im/farstream: builds fine for me, that's an odd linker error

graphics/gstreamer1-plugins-vulkan: oops, forgot in gstreamer1-plugins/Makefile.common: gst_vulkan_BUILD_DEPENDS=${LOCALBASE}/include/vulkan/vulkan.h:devel/vulkan-headers

graphics/gstreamer1-plugins-gl: ehh… ideally, bug 227423 would allow us to just depend on graphics/wayland instead of mesa-with-WAYLAND-option. For now I guess you can @comment that file.
